signInDesc: Enter your username and password below to sign in.
signOutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to sign in again to access your account.
registerHint: To register an account, please contact your administrator.

validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

wechat.signInDesc: Scan the QR code with WeChat to sign in.
wechat.backToPassword: Sign in with username and password
wechat.qrHint: Scan with WeChat to sign in to the admin console
wechat.bindDesc: First-time WeChat sign-in must be linked to an existing admin account. Self-registration is not supported here.
wechat.bindTokenExpired: Bind token expired. Please scan again.
wechat.bindTokenMissing: Missing bind token. Return to sign-in and scan again.

errors.missingParams: Missing WeChat callback parameters. Please scan again.
errors.loginFailed: WeChat sign-in failed. Please try again.
